areas_of_operations:
Principal Global Services (PGS) supports the Global Business Units viz. Retirement Income Solutions (RIS), Specialty Benefits Division (SBD), Life Insurance, Principal International, Principal Global Investors and Corporate Systems. 
Typical job functions consist of 
1. Back office activities in the areas of Pensions and Insurance such as: new enrollments, disbursements, loans, benefit events, financial claims processing, medical underwriting, actuarial services, accounting processes, customer servicing requests etc.
2. IT Application Services includes Application Development and maintenance, Business Analysis, Design & architecture, Quality Assurance
